calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Karen Tashima appearing on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff LRM Properties LLC.
Robert Lopez, Esq., appearing on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Linda Law, also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties and witness for LRM Properties Greg Leon sworn.
Mr. Lopez testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Linda Law.
Mr. Leon testified on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff LRM Properties LLC.
Ms. Tashima testified on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff LRM Properties LLC.
Appellant/Defendant Linda Law testified on her own behalf.

Plaintiff's and Defendant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Judgment Entered
